title: Sandbox Execution Environments
code:
def validate_sandbox_path(path, sandbox_dir):
    import os
    # Use string prefix checks on absolute paths
    abs_sandbox = os.path.abspath(sandbox_dir)
    abs_target = os.path.abspath(path)
    return abs_target.startswith(abs_sandbox)

def run_practice():
    sandbox = './sandbox'
    # target inside sandbox
    assert validate_sandbox_path('./sandbox/file.txt', sandbox)
    # target attempting escape
    assert not validate_sandbox_path('./sandbox/../host_file.txt', sandbox)
    print('[PASS] Sandbox path validation checked.')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    run_practice()
